title: TDD kill_port + E2E test skeleton
items: kill_port(port) added to run.py: kills any process on port 5000 before starting Flask
Starting the server now always evicts the old one — no more port pile-up
tests/test_run.py: 4 unit tests written RED-first, now GREEN (kill_port TDD cycle)
tests/test_e2e.py: 12 Playwright E2E tests spec'd as TDD failing tests
E2E tests cover: page loads (200, no 500), canvas, game-title from API, changelog modal
Modal tests: appears on fresh load, has title/items, dismiss works, persists reload
pyproject.toml: added pytest-playwright; e2e marker; addopts excludes e2e by default
ci.yml: split into unit-test step + playwright install + e2e step
start.ps1: new PowerShell launcher that kills port 5000 before starting
start.bat: fixed to use absolute PYTHONPATH (%~dp0src)
